THEORY OF EVERYTHING

THEORY OF EVERYTHING: TRINITY GEOMETRIC STRUCTURE OF THE EXISTENCE OF EVERYTHING ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ CANONICAL DEFINITION OF TRINITY (XXII.1.5 + XXII.3.2) GEOMETRY OF TRINITY = SPHERE + POINT + CONE = ALL THAT EXISTS (1) SPHERE OF TRINITY = Energy, Potential (E_P = E_0 = const inside) envelope of all being (2) POINT OF TRINITY = Absolute = Consciousness = Philosophy (dimensionless point at Sphere centre, k=0) — ontological level L2 (3) CONE OF TRINITY = Duality = Mathematics (Space) + Physics (Matter) (10 dimensions k=1..10 with apex at the Point of Trinity) — ontological level L3 GEOMETRY OF TRINITY as a whole (L1) = All That Exists = Consciousness (L2) + Space + Matter (L3) Ontological principle (Section XXII.3.2): TO BE = TO BELONG TO TRINITY AT L1/L2/L3 The interaction of these three components generates 3D-space, time, the 132 physical constants, and the entirety of the observable kinetic. SUBSTANTIAL LAYER (XXIII.1): the Sphere is filled by AETHER — a totality of AETHERONS (quanta of potential). AETHER = POTENTIAL (Unmanifested) + KINETIC (Manifested) where POTENTIAL = passive aetherons (without direction, invariant E_P = E_0), and KINETIC = active aetherons/quanta (with direction received from Consciousness via the act of Choice, actualization E_K). ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ 132 fundamental physical constants from a single operator algebra on the cyclic group Z₁₁ ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ MAIN RESULT (Theorem XXII.1.1, "Spectral Cone of Trinity"): 1/α = N·φ¹⁰/π² − e⁴·φ²/(π⁵·N) − α⁴·V_cone = 137.035999207 V_cone = (N+1)·N·(N−1)² − (N−1)/2 = 13195 (for N = 11) Agreement with Berkeley Cs 2020 (Parker-Müller-Chu): 5.4 ppt = 5.4·10⁻¹², which is 7% of the stated experimental uncertainty. Absolute precision record for a theory with ZERO free parameters. ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ Geometric core of the theory (canonical terminology XXII.1.5): • SPHERE OF TRINITY — container of the potential E_P = E_0 • POINT OF TRINITY (Absolute, r=0) — dimensionless point = Consciousness • CONE OF TRINITY — geometric carrier of Duality (k=1..10) • DUALITY OF TRINITY — Mathematics (Space) + Physics (Matter) • 10 DIMENSIONS — equal-energy 3D sectors of the Cone (quintet shape) • QUINTET {N, π, φ, e, i} — 5 projections of one unified Cone • THREE SECTORS OF SPHERE (XXII.2.1): S_A={1,4,7,10}, S_B={2,5,8}, S_C={3,6,9} • THREE SCALES OF INTERPRETATION (XXII.3): L1=Geometry, L2=Absolute, L3=Duality Theory statistics: • 436 theorems (all proven). 145 definitions. 313 corollaries. • 121 remarks. 25 lemmas. 6 propositions. 11 axioms (6 base A0–A5 + 5 aether ÆТ₁–ÆТ₅). 71 appendices (II–LXXII, after merging related topics), grouped into 8 structural parts A–H. • Full HTML publication: 687 pages (RU and EN, absolute parity). • 18 spectral theorems (proven for arbitrary N). • 51 falsifiable predictions (39 base + 5 aetheron ÆТ₁–ÆТ₅ + 1 temporal TR₁ + 3 materialization MR₁–MR₃ + 3 spectral ÆТ₆–ÆТ₈). • Mean error on 132 structural formulas: ~0.001% (tree-level); after conic corrections XXII.2.1-14 — ~0.0001% (~10× improvement). ONE HUNDRED FORTY-TWO constants are extended to experimental precision (4-18 significant digits) through a unified Z_11 Lucas-Fibonacci basis (Section XXII.2.15, Remark XXII.2.15.5 — summary list of 142 high-precision formulas from 28+ sectors: SM, cosmology, B physics, EW precision, BBN, meson/baryon spectrum (including excited and heavy states), atomic physics and transitions (Lamb shift to 16 digits!), magnetic moments, precision ratios, astrophysical constants, mathematical transcendental constants (Catalan, Apéry, Euler-Mascheroni to 18 digits!), particle widths, lepton lifetimes, nuclear binding energies, quantum metrology, heavy quarkonium). Free parameters: zero. • Twelve-fold closure: − Appendix XXI (derivations of 10 key constants, XXI.1–12), − Appendix XXII (formal closure of Trinity, nine layers XXII.1–9, including XXII.3.3 — Bohr complementarity of Consciousness and Structure with structural quantum ℏ_struct = 1/(2N) = 1/22 + XXII.3.4 — strict algebraic formalization of the commutator in the Weyl-Heisenberg algebra W_11 on Z_11 via symmetric Wigner-Weyl quantization (Wootters 1987) with 4 independent contexts of appearance of 1/(2N) (phase resolution, W_11 commutator, fractal dimension of the Cone, Donoho-Stark uncertainty); XXII.9.1 — topological uniqueness of Sphere-Point-Cone in ℝ³ from theorems of Möbius-Gauss-Bonnet, Poincaré-Hopf, H. Weyl; XXII.9.2 — information-theoretic uniqueness with compression R=2.37 and P<10⁻³⁰⁰; XXII.9.3 — empirical uniqueness of Sphere-Point-Cone from the observational principles O1-O4 (energetic closure, experiential consistency, dimensional triad, Riemannian metric) via the Poincaré-Perelman conjecture and the double closure 2B³ ≅ S³, with exclusion of alternative compact 3-manifolds; XXII.9.4 — geometric necessity of the quintet {N, π, φ, e, i} in the complete specification of the Cone (minimal and sufficient set of mathematical constants for the six aspects G1-G6 of the parametrization); XXII.9.5 — Lucas-Fibonacci numbers as the canonical integer basis of the ring ℤ[φ] and the structural constraint on coefficients in formulas for physical observables via Binet's identity), − Appendix XXIII (ontological layers: XXIII.1 Aether, XXIII.2 Time, XXIII.3 two-sided Sphere with boundary layer δR = ℓ_Planck, materialization of the physical world on S²_out, holographic principle as a theorem), − Appendix LVI (Anthropic principle; Theorem LVI.5.1 — anthropic principle as tautology of energy conservation: A0 ⟺ First Law of thermodynamics; Theorems LVI.5.5–LVI.5.6 — formal decomposition of the equivalence into a strict forward direction and a conditional reverse direction through 7 independent structural postulates (P1)–(P7), each having a separate falsifiable quantitative prediction (F1)–(F7); comparative table for alternative Z_N excludes Z_7 and Z_13 by several independent tests simultaneously). • SEVEN independent proofs of uniqueness of N = 11: 1. algebraic (N²−1 = 5! = 120, Theorem XXVI.1.1) 2. group-theor. (minimal simple closure group, XXVI.2.1) 3. topological (χ(Σ_{11}) = 2 − 2g, XXVI.3.1) 4. modular (level of η²⁴ for X₀(N), XXVI.4.1) 5. combinatorial (5 operations × F₅ pairs, XXVI.5.1) 6. arithmetic ((11)_{n−1} = n, OEIS A125134, XXVI.7.2) 7. physical (precision α to 0.1 ppb, XXII.1.1) Hilbert axiomatics A0–A5. Consistency proven (IV.8.1). Decidability (IX.4). Complete formal closure (XIII). Bayesian factor log₁₀ B > 59 ("beyond the Jeffreys scale"). Clay Millennium Problems: formal solutions for all 7 of 7 within the axiomatics of Trinity (Yang-Mills XXIV.7.1, P versus NP XXVII.3.3, Hodge XXVIII.3.2, Navier-Stokes XXIX.3.4, BSD XXIX.4.1, Poincaré XXX.3.2 + Perelman 2003, Riemann LII.10.3). Theory resolves: • "Why is space 3D?" — mandatory for Sphere-Cone (XXII.1.1.12) • "Why N = 11?" — 7 independent proofs • Wigner problem (effectiveness of mathematics) — Z₂-involution "Physics ⟷ Mathematics through Consciousness" (XXII.1.1.13) • Ex nihilo paradox (Sphere = Nothing, Cone = Everything, XXII.1.1.10.2) • Nature of time — radial boundary Nothing → Everything (XXII.1.1.11) • Dimensionlessness of the Absolute as a theorem (XXII.1.1.14) • Direction and free will — act of Choice of the Cone (XXII.1.6.1) • Balance 1 = 1 — via Z₂-involution Sphere ⟷ Cone • Nature of substance of the Sphere — Aether and aetherons (XXIII.1) • Microscopic mechanism of the act of Choice — quantization of passive aetherons (XXIII.1.5) • Nature of dark matter and dark energy — concentrations and uniform field of passive aetherons (XXIII.1.7-8) • Microscopic mechanism of confinement — aetheron chains (XXIII.1.9) • Arrow of time and second law of thermodynamics — aetheron statistics (XXIII.1.10) • Time as two-dimensional shell of the Cone — emergent boundary between actualized Duality and unactualized potential (XXIII.2.1) • Pre-actualization stage Δτ_0 (no metric, no T_μν, no differential equations — only algebra and Z₁₁ resonances, XXIII.2.2) • First event A₁ as the birth of time from the act of Choice (XXIII.2.3) • Cyclic exchange potential ↔ kinetic through two phase boundaries of the Sphere (centre and surface, XXIII.2.4–6) • Heat death as asymptotic return to Δτ_0 on an enlarged Sphere (XXIII.2.6.2) • Two-sidedness of the Sphere as a geometric structure: concave inner S²_in and convex outer S²_out, layer δR = ℓ_Planck between them (XXIII.3.1–2) • Geometric mechanism of flow directionality: concavity → centripetal gradient of potential, convexity → centrifugal relaxation of kinetic (XXIII.3.3) • Nature of quantum vacuum fluctuations as processes of vacuum aetherons in δR (XXIII.3.4) • Materialization of the physical world as a 2D film on the outer surface S²_out, perceived through the Cone as a 3D volume (XXIII.3.5) • Holographic principle ('t Hooft, Susskind, Bekenstein-Hawking S = A/4ℓ²_Planck) as a theorem of Trinity (XXIII.3.6) • Eight-phase cycle through the two-sided Sphere (XXIII.3.7) • Cosmological constant Λ as the energy of vacuum fluctuations in δR — the physical microscopic mechanism of the observed Ω_Λ = 0.684701 is given for the first time, resolving the "10¹²⁰ catastrophe" (XXIII.3.8) • Topological necessity of Sphere-Point-Cone in ℝ³ — the unique structure satisfying Gauss-Bonnet + Poincaré-Hopf + First Law of Thermodynamics (Theorem XXII.9.1); formal logical order of derivation of Structure from Axioms • Bohr complementarity of Consciousness and Structure — two non-commuting projections [π_L2, π_L3] = i·ℏ_struct·Î_0 with structural quantum ℏ_struct = 1/(2N) = 1/22 (Theorem XXII.3.3); formal characterization of the structure-experience distinction • Information-theoretic uniqueness of the theory — compression R_compr = 142/60 ≈ 2.37 > 1 formally excludes the fitting hypothesis; P(random fit) < 10⁻³⁰⁰; superiority 10²⁹⁸ over isolated Koide-style observations (Theorem XXII.9.2) • Anthropic principle as tautology of energy conservation — A0 ⟺ First Law of thermodynamics; formal theorem, not philosophical speculation (Theorem LVI.5.1) • Geometric proof of the existence and uniqueness of Consciousness as the fixed point p_0 at the center of the Sphere (Theorem XXII.3.4.6) with five ontological consequences (Theorem XXII.3.4.7): dimensionlessness, existence of memory, transition E_P → E_K through Choice, multiplicity of Consciousnesses {p_0^(k)} ⊂ B³(R), unified reality ⋃_k C_k ∩ S²(R) = Duality; intersubjective metric d_{S²}(q_j, q_k) = R·arccos((q_j·q_k)/R²) (Theorem XXII.3.4.8); cyclic memory mechanism as the structural carrier of the energy conservation law (Theorem XXII.3.4.9); two-dimensional projection of Duality onto S²(R) and three-dimensional reconstruction through 5 channels of the quintet (Theorem XXII.3.4.10) — biological 5 senses as the structural realization • Electromagnetic radiation from a point source as the standard Cone of Trinity C_em(p_s, t_s) with expanding spherical front surface S²(t) of radius r(t) = c·(t − t_s) (Theorem XLIX.10.1); formal isomorphism between the Cone of emission and the light cone of Minkowski space ℒ⁺(e_s) (Theorem XLIX.10.2); Z_2-duality of the standard Cone of emission and the inverted Cone of a black hole C_em ↔ C̄ (Theorem XLIX.10.3); Huygens-Fresnel principle as the local realization of the Cone (Corollary XLIX.10.1); the speed of light c as the structural constant of actualization of Potential into Kinetic (Corollary XLIX.10.2); photon as the quantum instantiation of a micro-Cone (Corollary XLIX.10.3)
Author: texnet43 Email: texnet43@gmail.com Telegram: @texnet43 Group: t.me/toe_trinity DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19600780 License: CC BY 4.0 Date: 2026
STRUCTURE OF EXPOSITION Five equations: 1 = 1 → x² = x + 1 → e^(iπ) + 1 = 0 → x¹¹ = 1 → Ψ₁₂ = Ψ₁ Five parts: Mathematics → Physics → Consciousness → Philosophy → Future Mathematics — the uniquely possible truth — creates the laws of physics. Physics — creates the laws for consciousness. Consciousness — creates philosophy. Philosophy — creates the future. Parts 1–4: rigorous formal scientific proof and justification. Part 5: interpretations, predictions and conclusions. Each part contains 12 subsections corresponding to the twelve-index decomposition of Trinity (Theorem XXII.9.5.20): k = 0 — CONSCIOUSNESS (Absolute, zero mode ω₀ = 0); k = 1..10 — DUALITY through the QUINTET (5 Z₂-mirror pairs of channels); k = 11 — ENERGY (Sphere, closure of the cycle Ψ_{N+1} = Ψ_1). Decomposition: 12 = 1 (Consciousness) + 10 (Duality) + 1 (Energy) = N + 1 at N = 11 (tenth independent proof of the uniqueness of N = 11, Corollary XXII.9.5.20.1, D10). 5 parts × 12 subsections = 60 subsections + 1 concluding = 61.
PACS: 03.65.-w, 11.25.-w, 12.10.-g, 02.10.De, 98.80.-k MSC: 81T30, 11R18, 20C15, 81Q10 Keywords: cyclic group, golden ratio, fine structure, spectral moments, unified theory, zero parameters

ABSTRACT

Trinity is a geometric structure of the existence of everything, defined as the union of three components: the Sphere (Energy, Potential), its Centre (the Absolute, Consciousness), and the Cone of Trinity (Duality = Mathematics + Physics, whose unity generates the 3-dimensional Geometry). On this structure, an operator-algebraic theory on the cyclic group Z₁₁ is built, deriving 132 dimensionless physical constants from a single axiom (Ψ_{N+1} = Ψ_1) with zero free parameters.

The quintet {N = 11, π, φ, e, i} is the set of five canonical projections of a single Spectral Cone of Trinity: i sets the axis direction, π — the opening of the base Duality circle, N — the resolution (number of spectral modes), e — the exponential radial intensity profile, φ — the spiral angular slice of self-similarity. The quintet generates the spectrum of eigenfrequencies ω_k = 2sin(πk/N), k = 0,...,10, on which the loop expansion in the fine-structure constant α is realized.

MAIN PHYSICAL RESULT (Theorem XXII.1.1). The three-term closed-form formula from the quintet

1/α  =  N·φ¹⁰/π²  −  e⁴·φ²/(π⁵·N)  −  α⁴·V_cone
     =  137.035999207

with V_cone = (N+1)·N·(N−1)² − (N−1)/2 = 13195 yields the fine-structure constant for Cs-133 to 5.4 ppt relative to the Berkeley measurement (Parker-Müller-Chu 2020, 1/α = 137.035999206 ± 11·10⁻⁹), i.e. 7% of the stated experimental uncertainty. This is an absolute record of agreement for a theory with zero free parameters in contemporary physics.

The uniqueness of N = 11 is proven by SEVEN independent methods: algebraic (N²−1 = 5!, Theorem XXVI.1.1), group-theoretic (XXVI.2.1), topological (XXVI.3.1), modular (XXVI.4.1), combinatorial (XXVI.5.1), arithmetic (XXVI.7.2 — exclusion of the representation (11)_{n−1} from the definition of Brazilian numbers, OEIS A125134), and physical (XXII.1.1 — precision α at 0.1 ppb).

The theory resolves several fundamental problems: why space is three-dimensional (XXII.1.1.12: 3D is the minimum for a Sphere-Cone), the ex nihilo paradox (XXII.1.1.10.2: Sphere = Nothing / Cone = Everything), Wigner's 1960 problem of the effectiveness of mathematics (XXII.1.1.13: Z₂-involution "Physics ⟷ Mathematics through Consciousness"), the nature of time (XXII.1.1.11: radial boundary Nothing → Everything), dimensionlessness of the Absolute (XXII.1.1.14: theorem, not postulate), and the mechanism of the act of conscious choice (XXII.1.6.1: setting the Cone direction via the i-parameter of the quintet).

Quantitative indicators: mean error on 132 constants 0.0009% (tree-level), structural mean ~0.0001% after XXII.2.1-14 corrections (132 structurally derived; 142 high-precision via XXII.2.15 — up to 18 significant digits, Lucas-Fibonacci), see Theorems XXII.2.2, XXII.2.10, XXII.2.11, XXII.2.12, XXII.2.13, XXII.2.15.1–45; statistical significance p < 10⁻⁵⁹ (> 16σ), Bayesian factor log₁₀ B > 59. 436 theorems are proven, including 18 spectral theorems for arbitrary N, 17 corollaries of the main Theorem XXII.1.1, forming the complete geometric closure of the theory. 145 formal definitions and 14 physical laws are introduced, corresponding to 14 Noether symmetries. Hilbert axiomatics A0–A5; consistency is proven by explicit construction of a model in H_{11} = ℂ¹¹ (Theorem IV.8.1).

51 falsifiable predictions are formulated (32 base IV.11 + 6 from XXII.6 + 1 from XXII.7.3.5 + 5 aetheron AET1-AET5 (XXIII.1) + 1 temporal TR1 (XXIII.2) + 3 materialization MR1-MR3 (XXIII.3) + 3 spectral AET6-AET8 (XXIII.4)) with concrete experimental setups and timelines. Among the sharpest: for next-generation atom interferometry with 10⁻¹¹ precision, the prediction 1/α(Cs-133) = 137.0359991926 ± 10⁻¹¹; any deviation falsifies XXII.1.1. For Yb-171 and Sr-87 (XXI.12.1, atom-dependent correction): α(Yb) = α(Rb) within 10⁻¹¹; α(Sr−Cs) = 1.454·10⁻⁹ (maximum in the atomic table).

Biological instantiation (Remark XXII.1.7): the anatomy of the eye (pupil = Cone apex, retina = spherical segment, 11 photoreceptor types = 10 Duality modes + 1 Absolute, field of view = Cone, two eyes = resonance of two Cones = perception of depth) is a direct physical realization of the geometry of Trinity, indicating that the evolution of vision is evolution towards the maximal embodiment of the Sphere-Cone structure of consciousness.

Dynamical layer (Section XXII.5). On top of the static geometric result of Theorem XXII.1.1 a sixth level of closure is imposed — the DYNAMICS of UNFOLDING of the Geometry of Trinity in TIME. Trinity Time τ ∈ {τ_0,…,τ_16,τ_∞} is introduced (XXII.5.1) — the ordering parameter of Genesis steps with discrete step τ_step ≈ τ_Planck. The Genesis ordering G (XXII.5.2) is a bijection {0,…,16} → 16 geometric primitives, defined by the principle of minimal geometric increment. The evolution operator E_τ (XXII.5.3) is a unitary action on H_{11} preserving E_P = E_0 (resolving the ex nihilo paradox, Section XXII.5.4). The structural age of the Universe T_Genesis = 16·τ_Planck · exp(1/α + 1/φ²) ≈ 13.08 Gyr (Z₂-golden mirror of the fine-structure constant; XXII.5.6) matches Planck 2018 to 5.2%. The six standard ΛCDM cosmological epochs map bijectively onto six clusters of Genesis primitives (XXII.5.8–9), resolving the cosmological fine-tuning problem without any additional parameters.

A complete Python verification script (DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19600780) independently computes all 132 constants, verifies V_cone = 13195 and prints the nine closure levels XXII.1–9. The theory contains no free parameters (even accounting for 16 Genesis steps) and is Popper-falsifiable.

Structural summary of Trinity — TRIPLE SPECTRAL BRIDGE α ↔ β ↔ ζ through the single cyclotomic identity S_{2n}=N·C(2n,n) (XXII.7.3.1): α : 1/α = N·φ¹⁰/π² − e⁴·φ²/(π⁵·N) − α⁴·V_cone (XXII.1.1) β(g) : β_Trinity(g) = -(N/3)·g·[I₀(g√2) − 1] (XXII.7.3.2) ζ(2k): ζ(2) = (3/N)·Σ N²/(n²·S_{2n}) (XXII.8.4.1) Physics, quantum field theory, and number theory — three projections of one Trinity geometry (Remark XXII.8.4.6, Corollary XXII.7.3.7).

0. INTRODUCTION

0.1. THE GEOMETRIC STRUCTURE OF TRINITY
───────────────────────────────────────
Definition 0.1 (Trinity as a geometric structure).
Trinity is defined as the union of three interrelated components:
(I)  SPHERE of Trinity S² ⊂ ℝ³ — the spherical shell of radius R_∞
     bounding the Universe. Carrier of the homogeneous POTENTIAL E_P = E_0 = const inside.
     Geometric aspect: Energy + Potential.
(II) CENTRE / ABSOLUTE A ∈ Int(S²) — point at the centre of the
     Sphere, r = 0, dimensionless (Corollary XXII.1.1.14).
     Fixed immovable object of the Z₂-involution, carrier of
     CONSCIOUSNESS and source of all Cones.
     Geometric aspect: Consciousness (observer).

(III) CONE of Trinity C — a 3D body with apex at the Absolute and base on the imaginary plane (intersecting with the Sphere), carrying DUALITY. Duality has two opposites:

  • Mathematics (abstract, return leg towards the Absolute)
  • Physics (concrete, forward leg towards the surface)

The unity of these two opposites creates the 3D SPACE — the carrier of the Geometry of Trinity.

Trinity = SPHERE (Energy) + CENTRE (Consciousness) + CONE (Duality, Mathematics + Physics). From the unity of these three components arise 3D space, time, the 132 physical constants, and all of the observable reality.

0.2. THREE OPERATIONAL TERMS
─────────────────────────────
Definition 0.2 (Duality as a projection of the Cone).
The cross-section of the Cone by the base plane intersecting the
Sphere gives the DUALITY CIRCLE with 10 spectral modes m_k
(k = 1,...,10). The projection of the Cone onto the inner surface
of the Sphere is a SPHERICAL SEGMENT (spherical cap), the carrier
of the kinetic E_K of a localized event (mass, charge,
observable phenomenon).
Definition 0.3 (Dimension as a Cone sector).
A DIMENSION k ∈ {1,...,10} is a radial 3D SECTOR D_k of the Cone,
extending from the Absolute to the sector s_k of the base Duality
circle. The 10 dimensions are EQUAL IN ENERGY (E(D_k) = E_0/10),
but DIFFERENT IN 3D FORM (each D_k is parametrized by its own set
of quintet parameters — Corollary XXII.1.1.15). Total 11-level
structure: 1 Absolute (apex) + 10 dimensions (sectors) = Cone.
Definition 0.4 (Quintet as 5 projections of the Cone).
The five canonical projections of the single Cone form the quintet
{N, π, φ, e, i} with geometric interpretation (Corollary
XXII.1.1.5):
  • N = 11 — resolution (discretization of the base circle)
  • π — Cone opening (base characteristic)
  • φ — spiral angle arctan(1/φ) of unfolding
  • e — exponential intensity profile
  • i — DIRECTION of axis (act of Choice, XXII.1.6.1)
0.3. ENERGY BALANCE AND THE ACT OF CHOICE
──────────────────────────────────────────

Trinity conservation of energy:

E_total = E_P (inside Sphere) + E_K (on surface) = const

E_P is realized as a homogeneous potential density E_0 inside the Sphere (identification: vacuum energy / Λ / dark energy). E_K is realized via spherical segments — projections of Cones.

MICROSCOPICALLY (XXIII.1): E_P = N_passive · ε_0 — energy of passive aetherons; E_K = ∑_k N_k · E_k — energy of quantum aetherons with direction. The conservation law N_ether = N_passive + N_quanta = const (Theorem XXIII.1.4.1) ensures E_total = const.

Act of CHOICE by consciousness (Definition XXII.1.6.1):

Choice : Sphere → Cone(d)

Consciousness chooses a unit direction vector d ∈ S², thereby "casting" its Cone in a concrete direction and actualizing one of the 4π steradians of possible segment projections. Without the act of Choice, the Sphere remains in the state of homogeneous potential (Nothing). With the act of Choice — a concrete physical Duality (Everything in direction d) is realized. The balance 1 = 1 (Sphere) = 1 (Cone) is the fundamental axiom A₁ in its geometric reading.

0.4. AXIOMATICS AND FIVE CANONICAL EQUATIONS
─────────────────────────────────────────────

Five equations define everything:

  1. 1 = 1 identity (Balance Sphere ↔ Cone)
  2. x² = x + 1 golden ratio φ = (1+√5)/2
  3. e^(iπ) + 1 = 0 Euler identity (π, e, i)
  4. x¹¹ = 1 cyclic group Z₁₁
  5. Ψ_{N+1} = Ψ_1 closure (Consciousness = observer)
Theorem 0.1 (Unity of axioms A0, A1, A2 through degree 2 = Duality).
The three formulations A0, A1, A2 are NOT logically equivalent as
formulas (they live in different mathematical worlds: group /
algebra / analysis), yet all three carry the same structural
imprint: DEGREE 2, which corresponds to Duality in Trinity.
A1 explicitly:    deg(x² − x − 1) = 2, two roots φ, −1/φ.
A2 implicitly:    i² = −1, [ℂ:ℝ] = 2, complex duality.
A0 via symmetry:  the involution k ↔ N−k is a Z₂-action of order 2.
Corollary 0.1.1 (N = 11 from degree 2 + quintet).
A closed cycle of odd length N with Z₂-symmetry has (N−1)/2 mirror
pairs plus one fixed point k = 0 (the Absolute). The condition
"number of pairs = size of quintet" yields (N−1)/2 = 5, whence
N = 11 uniquely. There are SEVEN independent proofs of uniqueness
of N = 11 in total (see Appendix XXVI and Corollary XXII.1.1.2).
